records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Next, we have news on the recent hot topic, the treasure.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>It has been a few days since the news spread, but there has been no particular progress on the investigation.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>However, we've received reports that the field investigation team has successfully restored the camera.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The police have revealed that they will continue the investigation based on the footage that has been recovered.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The police have revealed that they will continue the investigation based on the footage that has been recovered.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. It seems you have a little more breathing room than usual.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. It seems you have a little more breathing room than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a bit. It'll take several hours to organize the stacked paperwork.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a bit. It'll take several hours to organize the stacked paperwork.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Any updates on Yuppie's whereabouts?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Eternium navigation system dictates that she is back at Ground One.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The Eternium navigation system dictates that she is back at Ground One.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To cross the continent in just one day. Youth is truly an astonishing aspect of life!
records.m_Talk_DEU: To cross the continent in just one day. Youth is truly an astonishing aspect of life!
records.m_Talk_FRA: To cross the continent in just one day. Youth is truly an astonishing aspect of life!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The chief of the Future Strategy Department will probably return after tiring herself out. I'm glad we had a backup plan.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The chief of the Future Strategy Department will probably return after tiring herself out. I'm glad we had a backup plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, were you not watching out of interest?

Don't take it too seriously. Those things are all just scams
8g

Don't take it too seriously. Those things are all just scams

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That handwriting and those scribbles... look familiar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That handwriting and those scribbles... look familiar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That handwriting and those scribbles... look familiar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I made it clear that you'd be marching if you didn't change that damn skill name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I made it clear that you'd be marching if you didn't change that damn skill name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I made it clear that you'd be marching if you didn't change that damn skill name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must've not registered my words at all. You will be marching 40 km in full Administration gear... Actually, you will be swimming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must've not registered my words at all. You will be marching 40 km in full Administration gear... Actually, you will be swimming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must've not registered my words at all. You will be marching 40 km in full Administration gear... Actually, you will be swimming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll set the coordinates to a deserted island, and you are to return by tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll set the coordinates to a deserted island, and you are to return by tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll set the coordinates to a deserted island, and you are to return by tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's so harsh. What's wrong with Atomic Hilde Punishment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's so harsh. What's wrong with Atomic Hilde Punishment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's so harsh. What's wrong with Atomic Hilde Punishment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sun's about to set, so it'll be hard to navigate. I guess I'll have to stay the night on the island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sun's about to set, so it'll be hard to navigate. I guess I'll have to stay the night on the island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sun's about to set, so it'll be hard to navigate. I guess I'll have to stay the night on the island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. There's nothing to do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. There's nothing to do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. There's nothing to do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Witness Lee Sooyeon, the ace of the Administration!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Witness Lee Sooyeon, the ace of the Administration!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Witness Lee Sooyeon, the ace of the Administration!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The weather is nice today. Master was upset and I ended up coming to an island in full gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The weather is nice today. Master was upset and I ended up coming to an island in full gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The weather is nice today. Master was upset and I ended up coming to an island in full gear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I swam here, and I saw a lot of cute animals. Maybe I could think of this as a vacation to a zoo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I swam here, and I saw a lot of cute animals. Maybe I could think of this as a vacation to a zoo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I swam here, and I saw a lot of cute animals. Maybe I could think of this as a vacation to a zoo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beanstalk was all noisy about how anything could happen, but even in this isolated location, with my special move, the Lee Sooyeon Strike...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beanstalk was all noisy about how anything could happen, but even in this isolated location, with my special move, the Lee Sooyeon Strike...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beanstalk was all noisy about how anything could happen, but even in this isolated location, with my special move, the Lee Sooyeon Strike...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. Is there more to write?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. Is there more to write?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. Is there more to write?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it must be a coincidence. A diary is being spread around as ciphertext?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it must be a coincidence. A diary is being spread around as ciphertext?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it must be a coincidence. A diary is being spread around as ciphertext?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did it even end up in a Lost Ship...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did it even end up in a Lost Ship...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did it even end up in a Lost Ship...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ridiculous. Are you trying to embarrass me to death by using my past records?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ridiculous. Are you trying to embarrass me to death by using my past records?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ridiculous. Are you trying to embarrass me to death by using my past records?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did you even find that diary?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did you even find that diary?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did you even find that diary?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... They hold unique memories, so it might not be best to throw them away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... They hold unique memories, so it might not be best to throw them away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... They hold unique memories, so it might not be best to throw them away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found just the right Artifact for the occasion, and thought you might like it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found just the right Artifact for the occasion, and thought you might like it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found just the right Artifact for the occasion, and thought you might like it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dispose of it this instant unless you want your cube body to be reduced to a sphere. My patience is running thin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dispose of it this instant unless you want your cube body to be reduced to a sphere. My patience is running thin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dispose of it this instant unless you want your cube body to be reduced to a sphere. My patience is running thin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. I didn't expect you to be this repulsed by it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. I didn't expect you to be this repulsed by it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. I didn't expect you to be this repulsed by it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not worry. <color=#ffd34c>I'll take care of this</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not worry. <color=#ffd34c>I'll take care of this</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Surprisingly, this was the person who had stolen the chest!</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haven't you read the manual? It's the top security measure that can only be activated by management-level staff!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ALT Squad is all here! What's going on?

records.m_Talk_FRA: ALT Squad is all here! What's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome, Seo Yoon. We were actually discussing an important matter that the company's fate depends on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome, Seo Yoon. We were actually discussing an important matter that the company's fate depends on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome, Seo Yoon. We were actually discussing an important matter that the company's fate depends on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... You're calmer than I imagined.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... You're calmer than I imagined.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... You're calmer than I imagined.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not. I am on the verge of losing my sanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not. I am on the verge of losing my sanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not. I am on the verge of losing my sanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Titan. Please brief them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Titan. Please brief them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Titan. Please brief them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. It is about the treasure chest that has become quite famous recently. It seems to be an Artifact.

records.m_Talk_FRA: However, now that it has been advertised as a treasure chest, many greedy individuals will be after it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what does that have to do with the code red being activated?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what does that have to do with the code red being activated?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what does that have to do with the code red being activated?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is simple. The chief of the Future Strategy Department has been tricked by a criminal and is after the treasure chest.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It is simple. The chief of the Future Strategy Department has been tricked by a criminal and is after the treasure chest.

That criminal has committed serious offenses such as ship terrorism, and

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It is quite simple. The criminal is currently taking advantage of the Future Strategy Department Chief's innocence.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If her powers are involved in abusing the Artifact, it will seriously damage company operations in the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I understand. Is there anything special I should be aware of?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I understand. Is there anything special I should be aware of?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be too aggressive, and bring the perpetrator to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be too aggressive, and bring the perpetrator to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be too aggressive, and bring the perpetrator to me.

records.m_Talk_DEU: I still have some issues to resolve with the perpetrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still have some issues to resolve with the perpetrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep that in mind. I know you're still recovering, so get some rest.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep that in mind. I know you're still recovering, so get some rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...This is why I hate perceptive stray cats like you.
